3078230.name: Flesh (Classic)
3078230.description:
“Flesh is a dark fantasy game where you play as a mage who begins on a path to learn the secrets of necromancy. Journey through the broken world of Alma as you search for the powers locked within the human body.

What sort of mysteries will you uncover?”

Kleinman XOXO / Internet Personality

Explore Alma

Walk through broken villages, dark ruins, and ancient places.
Monsters wait in many corners.
You can go different paths in your own order. Freedom is yours.

Learn Necromancy and Defy Death

Use strange magic to take the remains of monsters and bring them back as undead.
They will fight for you.
Battles are turn-based. Think carefully. Use your powers wisely.
Discover spells and strange items that make you stronger.


Made for 2018’s A Game By Its Cover Game Jam. Inspired by the “Flesh” cover from Japan's My Famicase Exhibition.
